response.overview: Cempaka Melati works at a resort and has recently been experiencing mysterious occurrences such as her name being called, glimpses of her coworkers appearing mysteriously, and strange dreams. Not only that, her ex-boyfriend, Addin, now appears with his wife, Hana at the resort for their honeymoon. However, Melati avoids him because she is unwilling to recall memories with that man. Melati receives many gifts from a mysterious sender. At the same time, Addin tries to get close to Melati. Despite being married, Addin still harbors hope for Melati. It turns out Addin does not know the real reason why Mel broke up with him back then. Meanwhile, Melati's movements are being observed by a handsome young man named Zhariff. Zhariff's presence begins to capture Melati's attention. Strangely, none of Melati's friends have ever seen this young man. Hana, meanwhile, begins to suspect that Addin has something going on with Melati.
response.title: Cempaka Melati (TV2)
